entities.description: The geographical region where the study on watershed management was conducted

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY

entities.name: INPUT USE
entities.description: The application of agricultural inputs in production

entities.name: LOCAL MARKET IMPERFECTIONS
entities.description: Inefficiencies in local markets that influence production and conservation decisions

entities.description: The economic value assigned to agricultural land

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION

entities.description: The combination of individual farmer and government funding for land and water management
